stemHtml: The neutral point of an aeroplane is the point where:

options.a: assuming no flow separation, the pitching moment coefficient does not change with varying angle of attack.
options.b: the boundary layer changes from laminar to turbulent.
options.c: the velocity of the relative airflow is reduced to zero.
options.d: the aeroplane becomes longitudinally unstable when the CG is moved beyond it in an aft direction.
